response: Team Alpha #23 wrapped a sprint running January 15 to 26, during which they completed 38 of their 42 planned story points—surpassing their average velocity of 36—while finishing 8 user stories, fixing 5 bugs, and navigating 2 project blockers. Stakeholders rated the team’s sprint performance a 4.1 out of 5, reflecting solid execution despite the small shortfall in their planned story point workload.
